resources.string: Enter your PC\'s Wi-Fi IP address. You can find it in the desktop app\'s console log (line starting with [Companion]).
Please enter the PC\'s IP address first
✅ Connected! Now share any video link to \"Send to PC\".
❌ Could not reach the PC. Check: same Wi-Fi, desktop app running, firewall allows Java.
No link found in the shared text
Set the PC\'s IP address first
✅ Sent! Check your PC to choose the format.
❌ Failed to send. Is the desktop app running on the same Wi-Fi?
